name: large cavern
hints: This is a major underground junction with many exits. Explore all directions.
North leads to a tunnel with buzzing (bees ahead). South leads to the royal anteroom. Down leads to the maze of pits.
Go NORTH toward the bee tunnel for the Royal Honey treasure. Go SOUTH for the wine bladder. Go DOWN to enter the pit maze where the Persian Rug awaits.
Avoid going WEST - it leads to the computer memory chip (dead end). UP returns to the surface.
notes: Major underground hub connecting to the bee tunnel (N/room 31), royal anteroom (S/room 9), computer memory dead end (W/room 27), surface (U/room 6), and pit maze (D/room 12). Light is needed for this area.
